summary: Full backend + frontend test of new Admin Dashboard features: admin-register doctor/patient, admin-uploaded medical record, LpaCostChart. Added 11 new pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_features.py — all pass. Full backend suite: 56/56 PASS (45 existing + 11 new). Frontend E2E (Login -> /admin -> Register Doctor -> Register Patient -> Attach File pipeline -> LPA tab with cost chart) all functional end-to-end via the public preview URL. Stat tiles updated correctly (Doctors 22→23, Patients 19→20, Pending CIDs incremented, Anchored Roots=13). Toast 'Record attached to patient Pat UI Test' confirmed. LpaCostChart renders bars from n=1..n=500 with 'with LPA / without LPA' overlay.

issues: Non-blocking React warning in console: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component'. Likely a setState-in-render (e.g., toast/sonner or pipeline state being set during a render path). Does NOT break functionality but should be cleaned for thesis demo.

verified_flows: POST /api/users/admin-register doctor: 200, returns role=doctor, hospital/department persisted, no _id leakage.
GET /api/users excludes Mongo _id from every row.
POST /api/ipfs/upload (small dummy file) returns real Pinata CID.
POST /api/records as admin uploader: 200, uploader_role='admin', anchor_status='pending', record enqueued in /api/lpa/pending and returned by /api/records/patient/{addr}.
POST /api/records as admin to UNREGISTERED patient: 400.
POST /api/lpa/anchor by admin: 200 with merkle root, tx_hash, block_number.
Frontend Login -> 'Sign-in as Admin' navigates to /admin.
Frontend Tabs visible: LPA Batch, Attach File, Register Doctor, Register Patient, Anchored Roots, Doctors, Patients.
Frontend doc-gen-wallet-btn generates 0x-address; doc-register-submit registers and increments Doctors stat.
Frontend pat-gen-wallet-btn + pat-register-submit registers patient and increments Patients stat.
Frontend Attach File pipeline shows all five stages (encrypting -> uploading -> policy -> enqueue -> done) and the record appears in pending list with patient_name+diagnosis.
Frontend LpaCostChart renders with cost-per-record bars + savings %; current efficiency shows '50.0% reduction in per-record gas cost at this batch size' for batch=2.
action_items: (Low priority, cosmetic) Fix React setState-in-render warning surfaced on AdminDashboard. Likely candidate: toast.success() being called synchronously inside generateWallet during a render, or pipeline state being set without microtask defer. Wrap in queueMicrotask / useEffect or move toast call into onClick callback chain.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/records role check (line 507-509) correctly admits admin as uploader: is_admin OR role==doctor. Verified by test.
/api/users/admin-register (line 417) validates: admin signature, admin == ADMIN address, role in {doctor,patient}, target_address matches 0x[40 hex] format. All branches covered by tests.
MongoDB ObjectId is consistently excluded via projection {_id:0} across users_list, users_get, records_*, lpa_pending, lpa_anchors. Confirmed.

AdminDashboard.jsx adminRegister() signs 'admin-register-doctor'/'admin-register-patient' which is the exact JS string passed to wallet.signMessage — matches eth_account encode_defunct(text=msg) on server. No SIWE / EIP-712 mismatch.
adminUpload() signs 'admin-upload-record' and posts to /records — server verifies signature against ADMIN address; passes is_admin gate.
LpaCostChart receives batchSize=pending.length and totalAnchored=sum(anchors.leaf_count). Renders without exceptions.
Potential improvement (not blocking): /api/users returns ALL users without pagination (limit 1000). For thesis-scale it's fine.
Potential code-quality note: server.py is 1226 lines — could be split into routers/{auth,users,records,lpa,certificate,upload_requests}.py for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (login, register doctor, register patient, attach file pipeline, LPA cost chart)

test_credentials: Admin: address=0x12606Fa5e40FAd4D99D59Ee967aF4c418b6E5D8B, private_key=0xb61123baee2bb96625cfeabf70835eff22b81427cd030ec78e804d03d2dc7759 (derived from ADMIN_SEED='genc-admin-thesis-deterministic-seed-2026' via sha256). Click 'Sign-in as Admin' on /login.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run uses RUN_SUFFIX=uuid()[:8] to generate deterministic-per-run TEST_admin_doc_* and TEST_admin_pat_* wallets. State persists in test_database (idempotent across runs because suffix changes). Frontend test also created one extra doctor 'Dr UI Test' + patient 'Pat UI Test' + one IPFS-pinned record. Recommend periodic DB cleanup if test_database fills up; nothing critical for thesis demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin features (admin-register doctor/patient + admin-uploaded record + LpaCostChart) are fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_admin_features.py and verified end-to-end via Playwright. To re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` for backend (56 tests, ~15s). For frontend, the public URL is /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — log in via 'Sign-in as Admin' and exercise the Register Doctor / Register Patient / Attach File tabs. Pinata IPFS is REAL (uses PINATA_JWT). LPA anchoring tx_hash + block_number remain MOCKED (simulated keccak of root+ts and incremented in chain_state collection). One non-blocking React setState-in-render warning observed in console — see action_items.
